summary_zh: 建議將新北捷運三鶯線工程從 Point 改為 LineString 路廊，提升地圖可讀性；主檔直接改寫被安全檢查阻擋，因此先保存可套用 patch。
summary_en: Suggested changing the New Taipei Metro Sanying Line from a Point to a LineString corridor for better map readability. Direct active-file replacement was blocked by safety checks, so this patch is saved for safe follow-up application.
source_name: 新北市政府捷運工程局

proposed_properties.name: 新北捷運三鶯線工程
proposed_properties.name_en: New Taipei Metro Sanying Line Project
proposed_properties.address: 新北市土城區頂埔、三峽區至鶯歌區鶯桃福德沿線
proposed_properties.address_en: Sanying corridor from Dingpu in Tucheng through Sanxia to Yingtao Fude in Yingge, New Taipei City

public_safety_note: 本檔為資料修正 patch，不是公開首頁文案；不含內部目標或公開 KPI。
